tg.exp_basis: amorphous PLA Tg 331 K (58 C); honest +/-5% band. NOT the exp_lookup single-point [326,327.1].
tg.tg_note: single-rate slowest; rates [40,160,640]->[425.2,389.1,365.0] INVERTED (Tg falls with rate) -> slope-gate FAIL, no extrapolation. Raw MD Tg ~425.2 K vs exp 331 K = FAIL (+22.4%); consistent with the well-known glassy MD cooling-rate overestimate (~+100 K) -- offset-corrected Tg lands at exp. Headline property for PLA is DENSITY (PASS), not Tg.

density.exp_basis: amorphous PLA 1.248 g/cm3 +/-5% (crystalline PLLA ~1.290 excluded). polymer_rules PEST density is null; 1.248 is the amorphous literature value.
density.density_note: HEADLINE PASS x4 (PLA glassy: density is the clean validated property). PCFF ~2% low, well inside band.

bulk_modulus.method_note: glassy hierarchy: Murnaghan narrow B0'=1.00 (invalid, +-1000 atm) and no deform run -> fluctuation last-resort. 4.54 sits +0.9% over upper 4.5 (within SEM) -> boundary WARNING. Glassy BM hierarchy is Murnaghan-wide -> deform -> fluctuation (NOT uniform fluctuation, which is the rubbery convention). Method+run spread 3.1-5.1 GPa IS the finding: deform clusters in-band, wide-window Murnaghan (PLA4) runs high.

provenance.review_note: PLA replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: removed +100 K md_offset gamed-PASS (PLA1/PLA4); honest single-rate Tg FAIL (all slope-gate inverted); density headline PASS; glassy BM hierarchy per run.
